title: Influencer/Presenter for Product Video
description:
We are currently seeking an enthusiastic influencer or presenter to participate in a video about our product, with a focus on the pasteurization process. The goal is to explain how our products are processed and how they reach the market for sale.

What you need to know:

The script is ready and will be provided to you.
Our team will handle all aspects of video production, ensuring a smooth and professional shoot.
We’re looking for someone engaging, clear, and confident to help communicate this process to viewers.

title: Presenter/Model for Video
description: We are seeking an enthusiastic and knowledgeable model/presenter for an upcoming cooking video. The ideal candidate should have some experience with cooking and be comfortable in the kitchen. You will be assisting the chef during the production, helping with prep, demonstrations, and engaging with the audience. A friendly, confident personality and a passion for food are essential. If you enjoy cooking and enjoy being in front of the camera, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Influencer and Model for Cosmetic Product
description: We are looking for talent that embodies "unfiltered" professional beauty. The aesthetic is clean, radiant skin paired with high-impact color (glitter pigments, bold lips).
